texto: The ocean of the past, I still hide from so much of it and rely on all that I don't run from. Everything before him, I waited for the nightmare to end, and it did when he accepted me into his arms. It was a new birth, a new life, but it flashed too briefly and left me with only these rabid bits of time that eat me, these memories that haunt me, but he, the ghost I need, remains lost.
explicacao: Citação de Edward J. Rathke sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The ocean of the past, I still hide from so much of it and rely on all that I don't run from. Eve…” articula reflexao, desire, longing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
